历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 2106 → 3992 → 4131 → 2778 → 3186, showing significant fluctuation; the 2025 baseline is about 3186, a slight backward shift of about 408 places compared to 2024, indicating an overall oscillating trend; the university's enrollment plan in Shanxi Province for Science/Physics Category: 21 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 20 in 2024, 16 in 2025, showing a recent reduction trend; the 2026 plan is 14, a 12.5% reduction from 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 29th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 28–31 range in recent years, belonging to the top normal universities nationwide; no negative public opinion records for East China Normal University in 2026 reputation evaluation; ranked 28th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure, overall stable application attention; 14 disciplines rated A- or above, including Statistics A+, Software Engineering A, Mathematics A, Education A+, Psychology A, Physics A-; among Physics Category enrollment majors, Statistics corresponds to Statistics A+, Software Engineering corresponds to Software Engineering A, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics corresponds to Mathematics A, Physics corresponds to Physics A-, with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity; related majors at East China Normal University (Software Engineering, Data Science, Statistics) benefit from the overall engineering popularity; the number of Physics Category examinees in Shanxi Province in 2026 is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, with a slight reduction in candidate scale; East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city university, with strong regional appeal to Shanxi Province examinees; the small enrollment number for Physics Category (14 in 2026) limits the impact of cross-province application competition due to regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 3186, a 12.5% enrollment reduction in 2026, and a slight 3.4% decrease in Physics Category examinees, the enrollment reduction impact outweighs the examinee decrease; it is predicted that the 2026 Physics Category admission ranking will move slightly forward (harder to enter); the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2962, with a range of 2540–3384.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2540–3384, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Statistics and Mathematics and Applied Mathematics as primary choices, with Tier 1 Computer Science and Technology and Software Engineering as reach options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2540), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>3384), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety options.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 29th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 28–31 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier normal universities nationwide; no negative public opinion records for East China Normal University in 2026 reputation evaluations; ranked 28th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure, overall application attention stable; 14 disciplines rated A- or above, including Education A+, Statistics A+, Physical Education A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, World History A, Psychology A, Mathematics A, Software Engineering A, etc., with outstanding disciplinary strength; among History Category enrollment majors, Chinese Language and Literature corresponds to Chinese Language and Literature A, Law corresponds to Law (not separately rated), and Finance corresponds to Applied Economics (not rated).
